description: This fun template is a great way to share an oceanside event or information. This customizable template could be used by a non-profit, community group, recreation department, or chamber of commerce to highlight activities at a festival or during the summer. All BEE templates are compatible with Mailchimp, Gmail, Sendgrid, Hubspot, and other email tools and platforms. Customize these templates in minutes by signing up for a free account.

designer.description: a Russian-born graphic designer based in Pasadena, California.

html_data:
Weekend @ The Beach

Family Fun Month is an event that is intended to allow loved ones to take a respite from their daily lives and spend quality time together. Why not spent it



@ the beach?

 

Bubbles, Bigger!

Why are soap bubbles so colorful? When white light reflects from a soap film, some of the colors get brighter, and others disappear. White light is made up of light waves of many different frequencies.

Learn More
 
 
 

Leave Your Beach Chair, Have Fun!
